Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class BotTemplate

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.BotTemplate
public class BotTemplate extends Metadata

Java class for BotTemplate complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="BotTemplate">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="botDialogGroups" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}BotDialogGroup" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="botDialogs" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}BotDialog" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="contextVariables" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ConversationContextVariable" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="conversationGoals" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ConversationDefinitionGoal" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="conversationLanguages" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="conversationSystemDialogs" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ConversationSystemDialog" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="conversationVariables" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ConversationVariable" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="entryDialog" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="icon" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="mainMenuDialog" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="masterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="mlDomain" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}LocalMlDomain" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="richContentEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

  • Method Details

    • getBotDialogGroups

      public List<BotDialogGroup> getBotDialogGroups()
      Gets the value of the botDialogGroups property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the botDialogGroups property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getBotDialogGroups().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list BotDialogGroup

      Returns:
      The value of the botDialogGroups property.

    • getBotDialogs

      public List<BotDialog> getBotDialogs()
      Gets the value of the botDialogs property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the botDialogs property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getBotDialogs().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list BotDialog

      Returns:
      The value of the botDialogs property.

    • getContextVariables

      public List<ConversationContextVariable> getContextVariables()
      Gets the value of the contextVariables property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the contextVariables property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getContextVariables().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list ConversationContextVariable

      Returns:
      The value of the contextVariables property.

    • getConversationGoals

      public List<ConversationDefinitionGoal> getConversationGoals()
      Gets the value of the conversationGoals property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the conversationGoals property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getConversationGoals().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list ConversationDefinitionGoal

      Returns:
      The value of the conversationGoals property.

      public List<ConversationSystemDialog> getConversationSystemDialogs()
      Gets the value of the conversationSystemDialogs property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the conversationSystemDialogs property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getConversationSystemDialogs().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list ConversationSystemDialog

      Returns:
      The value of the conversationSystemDialogs property.

      public List<ConversationVariable> getConversationVariables()
      Gets the value of the conversationVariables property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the conversationVariables property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getConversationVariables().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list ConversationVariable

      Returns:
      The value of the conversationVariables property.
